steps.title: Define annular eclipse
steps.content: The previous sentence identifies the 899 BCE eclipse as annular. The following sentence explains what annular means: the Moon did not cover the Sun completely and instead created a ring of fire. The transition should introduce a definition or restatement.

steps.title: Reject nondefinition links
steps.content: A introduces an example, but the sentence defines the term rather than giving one example of it. B signals simultaneous events, which is not the relationship. D signals contrast despite an obstacle, while the second sentence simply clarifies the prior term. The answer is C.
